overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a mountain forest trail at dusk. The character transitions from a dense pine forest to an open mountain vista, then enters a medieval village with stone cottages and encounters an NPC villager.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with rocky cliff face

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow forest trail beside a rocky cliff

entered.detail: steep gray rock wall running alongside the path
dense evergreen forest lining the left side of the trail
narrow winding path through the mountain forest

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense mountain forest. A steep rocky cliff face runs along the right side while tall pine trees line the left, creating an enclosed corridor with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge with panoramic vista

events.description: emerging from dense forest into open mountain landscape with expansive sky views

agents.ego_description: walking along the ridge with expansive mountain views visible ahead

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peak visible on the horizon against purple sky
expansive view of mountain ranges and valleys in the distance

segments.scene_description: The trail opens onto a wide mountain ridge with panoramic views of distant snowy peaks against a purple dusk sky. The dense forest recedes into the distance as the path becomes more exposed and open.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village outskirts with stone cottages

events.description: entering village area with stone buildings and wooden fences becoming visible
villager NPC raises arms in greeting or alarm as Geralt approaches

agents.ego_description: approaching village structures along the cobblestone path

notable_agents.action: villager standing near stone wall raises arms in gesture toward Geralt

entered.detail: medieval stone building with thatched roof and wooden door
rough wooden fence lining the left side of the village path
lit torch mounted on the stone wall providing warm light

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a medieval village with stone cottages and wooden fences lining the path. A villager stands near a stone wall on the right, raising their arms as Geralt approaches, while torchlight provides warm illumination against the cool dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with campfire and wooden gate

events.description: passing a burning campfire in the village square with glowing embers

agents.ego_description: moving through the village center toward the wooden gate structure

entered.detail: burning fire pit with orange flames and smoke in the village square
large wooden archway and gate at the edge of the village
wooden wagon or cart parked near the stone building

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through the village center, passing a burning campfire that casts flickering orange light on the cobblestones. A large wooden gate structure stands ahead at the village edge, with a wooden cart parked nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic mountain forest into an expansive ridge and finally into a flickering medieval village at dusk. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by a steep rocky cliff and towering pine trees that obscure the sky. As the path opens, the dense forest recedes to reveal a wide mountain ridge with panoramic views of distant snowy peaks under a purple twilight. The scene then shifts as the trail leads into a village of stone cottages and wooden fences, where a villager gestures from a stone wall under the warm glow of torches. Finally, the camera moves through the village center past a burning campfire casting orange light on the cobblestones before approaching a large wooden gate and a parked cart at the village edge.
